Lance of Thunder  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Piercing Atk Delay: 46
DMG: 52 Dmg Bonus: 158
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +15 INT: +15 HP: +75
SV MAGIC: +15
WT: 15.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Lance of Thunder
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Piercing Atk Delay: 46
DMG: 52 Dmg Bonus: 158
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +15 INT: +15 HP: +75
SV MAGIC: +15
WT: 15.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Piercing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Valero ForceBlade
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-21 08:41:45
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Telkorenar


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded December 23rd, 2022 by halfridge
Updated December 27th, 2022
Send a correction
Post Comment
Sux
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 12:55 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780128791
84 posts
Windblade is almost as good as this thing. I prolly would keep my Windblade and let someone else get this unless no one else needed then I would take prolly. It's really slow which sucks but does have nice damage. As for epics and weapons... yeah, paladins get a major f***ing shaft there. 40% haste on your weapon and 100hp? Not to mention you can still use another weapon in other hand for even more stats/hp. Paladins get what, 70hp and a ****** 150 dd proc... it's lame as ****. Wheres the 40% on SK and paladin epix... WHERE IS IT?! Only class that get shafted as much in terms of epics is warriors. Better warrior weapons out there sure but you can still just get the buffs and such from epic.
▲ Page top
RE: Sux
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2004 at 5:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780592079
34 posts
I wouldnt mind having it =)
▲ Page top
RE: Sux
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2003 at 3:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
Actually, after actually having my Epic, I wouldn't say that Warriors totally got the shaft on them. The 2H Epic really shines in Tier 1-3. The DPS isn't extremely good, but with punishing blade the proc goes off constantly (way more than any other weapon I've used) and I rarely have aggro problems. Slowers I group with constantly remark about how easily I can pull aggro off them after slow and alot of the times they don't pull aggro from slowing anyway. All in all, I'm happy I finished mine. The resists and 100HP aren't too shabby either.

Now Pallies and SKs, yea they got shafted. Entirely too difficult for what you end up with.
▲ Page top
RE: Sux
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2004 at 5:35 PM Rating: Decent
Tellanis
37 posts
SK'S and Pally'S definitly get shafted with are epics they are hard as hell and for what? a 40hp life tap proc yea that will help me.

Rakharth of Pravus Mortis

QuoteReply
# May 07 2003 at 8:36 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749886248

I have owned this weapon almost two years. The delay kind of sucks, but with enchanter haste my SK is a killing machine. Hits for 250-400 regular hits and crits in the 650.

63 Shadow Knight

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 03 2003 at 3:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) aye the rogues might not get an uber piercer but look at their wepons 100hp on them 125hp on them WTF is that? Tank epics dont even have 100hp, my epic has 70 and Im a pally Go freaking figure.
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 16 2003 at 5:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) because pallys don't god damn well deserve anything more then a kick in the mouth=P
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 04 2003 at 10:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your mom deserve that because she gave you life, jerk
It's a great wepon
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2002 at 1:39 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361700938
Scholar
45 posts

I am fortunate to have a LoT, and just for reference, when xp grinding and STR above 200, it hits between 60 and 300, I'd have to say the average is about 150 or so. I find it a great weapon for raids, the damage output is fantastic, there is no proc to draw aggro off the Main Tank. The wisdom stat sure helps me to group (wave) heal in AE mob situations... and so on.

(When I play Main Tank in xp groups, I usually switch to the Emerald Bastardsword of Purity and a Sarnak Battle Shield, to reduce the heal mana needed due to the gain of about 100 AC by the switch.)

Telk drops both of these in ToV and he's certainly a nasty fight.

Nicketh Vindicatum
Crusader of Mithaniel Marr
Triadica
Solusek Ro Server

Nerfed
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 3:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591763324712
45 posts
You people that ***** and get weps like this nerfed will probly never end up seeing TOV , the Mobs these weps drop off are hard, real hard,, and the people that can kill them deserver nice wepons like this after the time it has tooken them to get to the lvl they are to get this,, so just cause you cant get one dont complain so other poeple cant have them, and one more thing, pally and sk deserve a wepon like this, the dmg dly ratio is godly , which makes up for there spells being crappy which they are, so for once they can do some good dmg, sure you might not like it when there dualing you,, but i bet you sure dont mind this wep when the sk/pally is helping you get your epic = P so on a final note, dont complain about loot, if you think its un-fair , start a sk or pally and go get your self one of these then, and i bet if it was for your class you wouldn't be like, this is unfair i will get somthing i can use nerfed = /

# Jul 12 2002 at 3:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409140606
569 posts
"tooken"....

Taken :)



"he dmg dly ratio is godly , which makes up for there spells being crappy which they are, so for once they can do some good dmg"


I see this is an old post but I thought I would correct and update it.

Spells no longer "crappy" if people thought that.
With the upgrade to paladins' damage output and 2h damage bonuses, we do decent damage now.

I own a Greatsword of Discipline (51/54). I can't wait to get Slay Undead 3 and get more AA exp off of the Grey undead snakes etc and crit for 2k+ with this class ability.

Someday I hope to land a "cleansing" blow to Doomshade :)







Edited, Tue Sep 24 06:26:24 2002

Pallys and Piercing
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2001 at 1:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ok, once and for all:
"2H piercing" and "Piercing" are the SAME skill! Pallys are NOT limited to only using "2H piercing" weapons (ask any pally using a Crystal Grinder to work on their piercing skill).
▲ Page top
Verant, naming, and Thunder.
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2001 at 12:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361073651
38 posts
It is MAGIC ITEM flagged, hence Thunder, and also gives SV MAGIC. Good enough? Didn't think so, really. The names are just to add some variety usually. Then again, why am I siding with Verant? Maybe they make balanced classes when you look at them really in-depth(Just don't look at necros!). Shamans get alchemy, makes up for lack of soloing, just makes better on plane raids with their teleport potions, and their buffs. Bards -- They are considered a hybrid, basically a rogue/entertainer. They get masks of deception and all. Then there are SKs, they are like necros, except their own pet, more powerful than normal necro pets.

And my last point for siding with Verant? They have created a game that has totally addicted people. Below all their ranting, they still like the game. I hope that some agree and some disagree, I look forward to any responses.
▲ Page top
Your an ignorant fool
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2002 at 1:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248599788
Scholar
7,486 posts
so many things wrong with that post

a LEVEL 14 IS TALKING ABOUT CLASS BALANCE.

at level 14 you havent gotten alchemy and havent realized it sucks yet. at level 14 necromancers are arguably the most powerful class (if we are talking untwinked without a doubt most powerful).

shamans are great soloers. many shaman solo 1-50 and even higher.

at level 14 dont even talk about the planes. at best you've heard second hand accounts and seen screen shots.

bards are not even comparable to hybrids. only the ignorant would even compare a ranger, shadowknight, beastlord, or paladin to a bard.

sks and necros, again not even comparable. a necro can solo things with ease a shadowknight wouldnt even dream of killing.

at level 50 against blue mobs a buffed necro pet (buffed only by the necro) will most certainly out damage a shadowknight.

all and all a completey worthless post full of nothing but bull ****
▲ Page top
RE: Your an ignorant fool
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2002 at 3:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570734176
View User Forum
22 posts
A bard may not be able to melee as effectively as a hybrid or pure melee, but they can solo about 5 red guards at the same time or more even. It is a long boring process but my 35 bard can kill all the guards in East Commons at the same time. And BTW its you're not your.

Edited, Thu Nov 7 15:33:46 2002
▲ Page top

Sorry sir, I wield a 25 stone weapon some times... All that it does for me is eat up 25 stones weight of lewt, and makes it so I'm too fatigued to jump sooner than if it were 5 stone.

100+ sta = what ever melee class needs, not just for the hp, but for the ability to wield any weight weapon, and not have combat stats drop when the stamina bar runs out.
